title: Me, Grandma, Iliko and Ilarion
actors: Sergo Orjonikidze, Sesilia Takaishvili, Aleksandre Jorjoliani
plot: Grandma Olgha up-brings orphan Zurikela in poverty. Their struggle for life is being relieved by support of their kind neighbors, Iliko and Ilarion, whose merit is the exceptional sense of humor.
